name: Pasta and Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the olive oil into a large soup pot. Add and sauté the onions, mushrooms, and garlic over low-medium heat for about 2 or 3 minutes. Stir continuously.
2. Add the water, lentils, and tomato paste. Stir well and bring to a boil over high heat. Then reduce heat to medium. Add the bay leaf, ginger, salt, and pepper. Stir, cover the pot, and cook for 40 minutes.
3. Add the pasta, cover the pot, and simmer slowly for 15 minutes or until the pasta is cooked. Stir again and serve immediately. Some grated Parmesan may be sprinkled on top of each serving.
